title: Paint Trim Guard, 12" Paint Shield for Skirting Board Painting Guard, Stainless Steel Straight Edge Painters Tool for Cutting in Paint Wallpaper Guard & Measurement
features: Exquisite Materials: Paint shield is made of high-quality stainless steel and plastic materials, with exquisite workmanship, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, can withstand frequent use indoors and outdoors, and is durable
Ergonomic Design: The handle is ergonomically designed, which can be used to paint window frames, ceilings, floors, skirting boards and other projects, with high efficiency and easier to use

Professional Effect: Paint guards prevent color bleeding, provide precise edges and clean lines, suitable for quickly covering large areas, help eliminate painting stress and minimize mess during painting and decoration tasks
Wide Application: The size is 30.4x7x1 cm/12x2.75x0.4 Inch (LxWxH), suitable for repairing wallpaper and various painting tasks, and is an ideal choice for professionals and DIY enthusiasts

Versatility: Used as a wallpaper smoother to easily eliminate creases and bubbles; used as a paint trimmer to clean and repair ceilings and around decorative objects, providing versatility in various home improvement projects
